title: Miniature Fashion Doll Set with Accessories in Egg Case Portable Pretty Doll Blonde Hair Blue Shoes Heart Balloon Collectible for Children Imaginative Play Girls Toy 2 Pack
features: IMAGINATIVE PLAYTIME ADVENTURE – Inspire storytelling and creative expression with this delightful miniature fashion doll set. Children will enjoy endless imaginative play, inventing new stories and scenes as their little doll embarks on adventures with her heart-shaped balloon and vibrant accessories, sparking hours of joyful entertainment.

COMPACT PORTABLE DESIGN – The handy egg-shaped case keeps the doll and accessories secure and ready to go anywhere. This clever storage makes it easy for young ones to bring their favourite toy on family outings, visits, and holidays. Ideal for on-the-go fun, the case fits perfectly in backpacks and little hands, making playtime portable.

CHARMING COLLECTIBLE DETAILS – Adorable features abound, from the doll’s blonde hair and sparkling blue shoes to her heart-embellished pink top and turquoise skirt with silver stars. Children can mix and match outfits, accessorise with the sweet blue purse, and showcase their mini doll in style, encouraging a love of collecting and fashion.

SAFE FOR SMALL HANDS – Crafted from sturdy plastic and soft fabrics, this fashion doll set is gentle and suitable for children aged 3 years and above. The smooth surfaces and size tailored for little fingers ensure comfortable, safe play, promoting fine motor skills and confidence as kids grow their collection and imagination.

IDEAL GIFT PACK WITH ELECTOYS QUALITY – Each pack contains two beautiful dolls, perfect for birthday surprises or party treats. Treat your child to the magic of carrying their world of play along, thanks to Electoys strong commitment to delightful, family-focused toys. Recommended for ages 3+, includes 2 dolls in secure egg-shaped cases.
description: Product description Let your child’s imagination soar with this pretty miniature fashion doll set designed for hands-on creative play. Each petite doll stands just the right size for small hands, with sparkling blonde hair, stylish blue shoes, a cheery pink top with a sweet heart design, and a turquoise skirt decorated with shimmering silver stars. Included accessories—a charming blue heart-shaped balloon and a delicate purse—invite endless storytelling and imaginative role-play. Built for portability, every doll and its accessories come housed in a colourful egg-shaped case. Kids can easily transport their miniature best friend on car journeys, playdates, or family trips, opening up a world of fun wherever they go. The compact case fits perfectly in a handbag, rucksack or pocket, keeping everything safe and together for adventures on the move. Each set celebrates collectability and style, making these dolls ideal for young children who love mixing and matching outfits, sharing dolls with friends, or displaying them proudly. The vibrant colours and well-considered details captivate and inspire, allowing children to imagine parties, picnics, or magical holidays. Made for safe, gentle play, the fashion doll set uses quality materials including smooth plastic and soft fabrics, and is recommended for children aged 3 and above. This duo pack is ideal for birthdays, stocking fillers, or a rewarding treat for little collectors. Trust Electoys to deliver quality and joy, helping children dream, play, and explore new worlds in a family-focused and creative way. Safety Warning Keep away from fire
